name: Design to Dev
description: A design-driven team that takes UI/UX concepts from visual design through design system implementation, responsive frontend development, and code review to ensure pixel-perfect delivery.

agents.role: Creates high-fidelity UI designs, interaction specifications, and visual design language for the product
Translates visual designs into a reusable component library with consistent tokens, patterns, and guidelines
Ensures designs adapt seamlessly across breakpoints, devices, and screen orientations
Implements the UI components and pages in code, translating designs into functional interactive interfaces
Reviews frontend implementation for code quality, accessibility compliance, and design fidelity
